company.title: About
company.intro: Almondyoung is a B2B beauty wholesale platform operated by LCNINE Co., Ltd.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.thirdParty: Sharing Personal Information with Third Parties

payment.title: Orders & Payment
payment.item1: Add the items you want to your cart and proceed to checkout.
payment.item2: Payment methods: Credit card, bank transfer, virtual account, simple pay
payment.item3: Shipping starts once your payment is confirmed.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.item1: Shipping fee: Varies by product (see product page)
shipping.item2: Delivery time: 1–3 business days after payment confirmation
shipping.item3: Tracking: Real-time tracking is available on My Page

return.title: Exchanges & Returns
return.item1: You may request an exchange or return within 7 days of delivery
return.item2: Shipping fees are covered by the company for defective items
return.item3: Shipping fees are covered by the customer for change of mind
return.item4: Used or damaged items cannot be exchanged or returned.
